name.description: Name provided for the gift certificate that will appear in the control panel.

theme.description: The theme of the gift certificate. The following options are available:`birthday.html`, `boy.html`, `celebration.html`, `christmas.html`, `general.html`, and `girl.html`.

amount.description: Value must be between 1.00 and 1,000.00 in the store’s default currency.

message.description: The message included in the gift certificate is limited to 200 characters.
